music.title: Music
music.subtitle: Releases, curated sets and live sessions

deepsidency.title: Deepsidency
deepsidency.subtitle: Monthly curated set series. Club sound, independent and authentic.
deepsidency.description: Deepsidency is more than a set series: it's a mental residency that reinvents itself every month. Deep house, melodic techno and hypnotic progressive, woven into a narrative that moves without rushing. Each episode is a curation for ears looking for something beyond speed.
deepsidency.audience: For those who don't go out every weekend anymore, but when they do, they mean it.

nowhere.title: Nowhere Traveler
nowhere.subtitle: No map. Just movement.
nowhere.description: Nowhere Traveler is the live act born after two decades behind the decks. Synthesizers, real-time loops and atmospheric textures that are composed, transformed and deconstructed on stage. Each performance is unique: a sonic travel journal between club and contemplation.
nowhere.quote: There is no destination. Only emotional trajectories.
nowhere.pillar_sonic: Deep, progressive and electronica between 118-126 BPM. Granular textures, long pads, warm bass and minimalist percussion with groove.
nowhere.pillar_performative: Modular show structure. Directed improvisation with melodic hooks that return as anchors.
nowhere.pillar_visual: Broken cartographies, glitched topographic lines. Audio-reactive visuals in real time.

story.title: Story
story.name: Miguel Espinosa a.k.a. Spin
story.bio_1: DJ and sound curator with over 20 years in the electronic scene. I'm not a hits DJ: I'm a narrator of emotions, someone who believes music doesn't impose itself, it insinuates.
story.bio_2: Each set is a session of emotional curation, where tempo, texture and energy talk to the audience in real time. From underground spaces to boutique events, my approach adapts but always keeps a deep identity: enveloping sound, elegant groove, subtle progression.
story.bio_3: I've played at Baum, Billares Londres, Octava, Radio Berlin and Hotel W in Bogota. In Barcelona, at City Hall, Macarena and the W. In Ibiza, live from Ibiza Global Radio. In Mexico City at AM and the DJ World Conference.
